title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 12 - 2017: Rode 70 miles

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a day of heavy training (70-mile bike ride plus a run and swim), then describes a low-key day recovering, working on taxes with his mom, and listing his van for sale. He plans to get out for another bike ride, run, and swim before dark and mentions a broken spoke from the previous day's ride that his roommate helped fix with new wheels.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited to keep the streak going, day four feels fun
accepts being near the back of the pack but notes he can hold wheels with slower riders
actively working on it, getting the ball rolling with ads on Craigslist and other sites

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder V-LOG. I was going to do a green screen, but I didn't get around to it.
It's already 4.30 in the afternoon, and I need to do my V-LOG for yesterday, so let's just record this and get it out.
So yesterday I came home from my bike ride, and I did 70 miles.
I did 25 miles, and then ran 4 miles, and then swam 400 meters.
And then I rode 3 days on Monday, and then on Tuesday I rode 65 miles, and then yesterday I rode 70 miles.
I came home and I was super tired, so I was super tired to do the video.
So then I went to sleep, and then I didn't get up until kind of later on in the day, because I was kind of tired.
And then I went into my mom's house, and we were trying to figure out my taxes.
I have to do my taxes, and I've never done taxes with TurboTax before.
So we were trying to figure out that, but then we got stuck, and then I started doing more stuff, selling my van,
Putting ads in my van on Samba and Craigslist, and then we'll do another website, and I'll fix that stuff out and do commercials for that.
So yeah, I'm getting the balls, the wheels rolling for all that stuff.
So I think I want to go on a bike ride now before it gets too dark.
That's why I want to do this and upload it, get really high, and then go on a bike ride.
I bet I like to run and then swim.
That would be fun if I can do that.
It's great, finally doing exercising again.
Today's going to be my day number 4.
I'm not going to listen to anything, though, in terms of audio books, just music.
When I run out of weed, yesterday, on the way back, I was still like 20 miles out.
My spoke broke in the back, and so my wheels started doing this.
So I unhooked my wheel, rear brake, and that wheel is ruined, but my roommate gave me a brand new set of wheels.
So it's awesome, strong wheels.
So I'm excited.
So I'm ready to hit it again.
Go out there today.
That's fun.
It's fun.
Yeah, I just covered some stuff about Strava.
I was fiddling around on Strava, and there's like Strava segments all over the place.
And then I can see where I am.
I'm pretty much at the back of the pack.
Like out of 83 people on this straightaway, I was 80th.
So I'm pretty much right at the back.
But that's, I mean, that's what it seems like out on the road.
Everybody's zooming by me.
So, but I can get on wheels, though.
I'm not so bad.
Like the slower guys, I can get on their wheels.
So anyways, let's see.
That's enough for now.
All right, peace out.
